DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-22-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON, BANK OF AMERICA, NA AND RECONSTRUCT COMPANY, NA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.
Appearances: Lily R. Robinton of Bryan Cave (675.3405) for defendants and moving parties; no other appearances.
The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: sustained with twenty days leave to amend. Plaintiffs are granted leave, if they can do so in good faith, to allege: (1) unconditional tender; (2) the terms of the contract or loan modification with more clarity; (3) that plaintiff is owed money and entitled to an accounting and restitution; and (4) a promissory estoppel claim. The wrongful foreclosure cause of action appears improper because no foreclosure actually occurred. A party can bring a UCL cause of action merely to recover restitution. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: Sonia Wong, CSR #11288
